posts.author: bbbhutra
posts.text: CNBCTV18 – 28 May 26 Deepak Fertilisers Q4 profit hit by one-off impact despite strong revenue... Deepak Fertilisers reported a sharp fall in fourth-quarter profit amid margin pressure and planned maintenance shutdown costs, although revenue growth remained strong, supported by higher TAN and CNB volumes.

posts.author: vikashkota
posts.text: 1.pdf (373.0 KB) Agreed on your observations, but we can wait for management commentary and way forward journey of the company.

posts.author: Nirav_Mamniya
posts.text: Poor Q4 results. Further delayed commissioning of the new plants. Despite the rise in ammonia prices, the profitability hasn’t been translated well. Debt levels have risen. bseindia.com df1329a4-463a-4c6f-98d0-26f581e953eb.pdf
